text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > General Legal Aid * Immigration Issues 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Immigration Issues Native American Community Migrants Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES EUGENE REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides social services case management for asylum seekers, refugees, and others with immigration status for help with food, transportation, health services, OHP (Oregon Health Plan), RCA (Refugee Cash Assistance), SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program ), TANF (Temporary Assistance for Needy Families ), WIC (Women, Infants and Children), and other services. Also provides employment and legal services. 1464 W 6th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Varies according to program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 1326 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides social services case management for asylum seekers, refugees, and others with immigration status for help with food, transportation, health services, OHP (Oregon Health Plan), RCA (Refugee Cash Assistance), SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program ), TANF (Temporary Assistance for Needy Families ), WIC (Women, Infants and Children), and other services. Also provides employment and legal services. 1025 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Varies according to program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 1326 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PUEBLO UNIDO PDX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a navigation team that helps community members overcome financial, technological, linguistic, and literacy barriers to legal representation and social services. Eligibility: Individuals with vulnerable immigration status Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, closed federal holidays Email (503) 912-8925 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM
